title: pseudoroegneria libanotica
intro: Pseudoroegneria libanotica, also known as Lebanon fescue or Atlas fescue, is a perennial grass species native to the mountainous regions of Western Asia and the Caucasus. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pseudoroegneria libanotica include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
